handoff: Review the queue weekly before publishing response drafts or using proof quotes.

reviews.text: Appointment started late and nobody explained the delay.
The hygienist was gentle and explained every step clearly.

name: Review intelligence action queue

steps.name: Analyze source reviews
steps.output: Review rows with theme, sentiment, urgency, response draft, proof quote, and recommended action.

steps.name: Merge into local response queue
steps.output: Prioritized queue for response work, proof quotes, recurring themes, and client-report bullets.

steps.name: Route proof and risk
steps.output: Send urgent complaints to the response owner and positive proof quotes to local pages or client reporting.
